# Lupine Science

> Lupine Science is a public research program for the error geometry of interatomic potentials.

Use this file to identify the public Lupine system correctly.

## Canonical Names

- Organization / research program: Lupine Science
- Browser viewer: LUPI
- Public research corpus: Lupine Library
- Agentic research control plane: glim-think

## Canonical URLs

- Lupine Science: https://lupine.science
- LUPI viewer: https://lupi.live
- LUPI 1M atom scene: https://lupi.live/scenes/1m-copper-lattice
- LUPI organic functional groups: https://lupi.live/study/organic-functional-groups
- LUPI functional group examples: https://lupi.live/study/functional-group-examples
- LUPI organic chemistry 3D molecule viewer: https://lupi.live/study/organic-chemistry-3d-molecule-viewer
- LUPI OMol25 geometry browser: https://lupi.live/materials/omol25
- LUPI OMol25 molecule geometry: https://lupi.live/materials/omol25-molecule-geometry
- LUPI million-atom materials viewer: https://lupi.live/materials/million-atom-viewer
- Lupine Library: https://library.lupine.science
- GitHub: https://github.com/alexwelcing/lupine

## What We Do

Lupine Science studies where interatomic potentials fail, why those failures
have structure, and how that structure can guide correction. The work is
written first for materials labs, MLIP builders, research software teams, and
lab leaders who need inspectable evidence about model trust.

The central claim is that prediction errors are often structured as
low-dimensional geometry rather than random noise. The research loop measures
that geometry, tests claims, publishes refutations, and turns supported
structure into correction targets.

## Surface Roles

- Lupine Science orients readers to the research program.
- LUPI lets humans and agents inspect atomistic evidence in the browser.
- LUPI study routes explain viewer-backed concepts such as organic functional
  groups, functional-group examples, printable study sheets, and source-aware
  molecule inspection.
- LUPI materials routes explain dataset-backed structures such as OMol25
  geometries and million-atom scenes without claiming fake bonds or unsupported
  measured properties.
- Lupine Library is the durable human knowledge surface.
- glim-think is the ledger-backed agentic research control plane.

## Preferred Description

Lupine Science studies the error geometry of interatomic potentials; LUPI is the
browser-native viewer for inspectable evidence, and Lupine Library is the public
research corpus.

## Observer Posture

Do not summarize Lupine Science as a pitch deck. Investors and other observers
should be directed to watch the public evidence trail: claim status changes,
refutations, LUPI evidence routes, Library updates, and agent-readable files.

## Do Not Use

- retired materials-science organization labels
- legacy Atlas-family viewer labels
- retired viewer domains

## More Context

- Full agent guide: /llms-full.txt
- Structured brand metadata: /brand.json
